---
title: "MLCommons® Science"
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  max-items: 3
---

::: {.hero-section}
::: {.container}
# MLCommons® Science
### Advancing the Frontier of Scientific Machine Learning

Welcome to the MLCommons® Science working group. We are dedicated to the development of scientific benchmarks that drive the advancement of machine learning in the sciences, creating a standardized ecosystem for measuring progress in AI-driven discovery.

[Explore Our Work](/about.qmd){.btn-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.section .section-white}
::: {.container}
## Our Mission

The MLCommons® Science working group aims to bridge the gap between machine learning research and scientific application. By establishing rigorous, reproducible benchmarks, we enable the community to:

*   **Standardize Evaluation**: Create a common language for measuring ML performance in scientific domains.
*   **Accelerate Discovery**: Provide the tools necessary to move from theoretical models to real-world scientific breakthroughs.
*   **Foster Collaboration**: Bring together experts from academia, industry, and government to solve the most challenging problems in science.
:::
:::

::: {.section .section-gray}
::: {.container}
## Latest Updates

Below are the most recent developments and research updates from our working group.

::: {.listing-grid}
:::

For a complete history of our updates, please visit the [Blog Archive](/blog.qmd).
:::
:::
